relationships.team-dynamic: Ancient ecosystem. Tomasz welcomed back. Seo-yun observes from the edge.

events: T1: Tomasz arrives at the Centre. Badge A. Goes to verification room.
T2: Seo-yun arrives. Badge C. Badge beeps red at verification level. Eats alone.
T3: Tomasz begins verification -- 7th seal set apart (ambiguous texture). Seo-yun calibrates, first samples clean. Team seen at canteen.

T4: Seo-yun finds 0.3% shift on lot 17-C Fe-Ni peak at 44.7°. Within tolerance (±0.5%) but tolerance was set for 150 GPa, system operates at 340 GPa. She verifies 3 times, checks calibration. Doesn't speak yet -- not sure. Starts looking at validation docs.
